My name is Dr. Lynn Kowalski, and I'm a gynecologic oncologist in Las Vegas, Nevada. I want to show you this video of a hysterectomy where I removed the uterus, ovaries, and tubes in eighteen minutes. This patient is an elderly woman who had been bleeding heavily from uterine cancer. We were anxious to do her surgery with a minimally invasive approach to avoid an old-fashioned traditional incision. This video is unedited from start to finish to illustrate the efficiency and precision of my technique for robotic hysterectomy. Many women are not aware that robotic technology exists for hysterectomy. I hope that with this video, women will know their surgical options. I want to emphasize that speed is not the goal here, but efficiency and precision are. Efficient surgery means less anesthesia time and fewer surgical complications. I also believe that more efficient surgery is easier on the patient with less trauma and a shorter recovery. Let's watch together.
